case_title: LOPEZ, JAYNE KELLY DE vs. OPLANIK, SLAVA et al

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF NOV-15-1994, CONTINUED TO MAY-15-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR BAR ASSOCIATION OF SAN FRANCISCO ARBITRATION. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
HEARING FOR PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, JAYNE KELLY DE HEARING SET FOR APR-19-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, HEARING FOR PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, CALENDAR OF APR-19-1995, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, JAYNE KELLY DE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OPLANIK, SLAVA $3,740.39 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,740.39, WITH INTEREST AT THE LEGAL RATE FROM 17-JAN-95 UNTIL FULLY PAID.
NOTICE OF STAY OF PROCEEDINGS FROM BAR ASSOCIATION OF SAN FRANCISCO FILED BY DEFENDANT OPLANIK, SLAVA
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER LIFTING STAY OF PROCEEDINGS, REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, JAYNE KELLY DE
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, JAYNE KELLY DE

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, JAYNE KELLY DE AS TO DEFENDANT OPLANIK, SLAVA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          NOV-15-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-16-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       OCT-26-1994
CLERK'S NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING
